caption:
"Why do you do labs before starting treatment?"

We get this question often. Here's why comprehensive lab work isn't optional at Rani—it's foundational.

Before we prescribe GLP-1 medications, hormone therapy, peptide protocols, or vitamin injection programs, we need to understand YOUR unique biochemistry.

Our standard panels include:
• Complete metabolic panel (CMP)
• Lipid panel
• Thyroid function (TSH, Free T3, Free T4)
• Hormone levels (as indicated)
• Hemoglobin A1C
• Vitamin D, B12, iron studies
• Additional markers based on your treatment goals

This data tells us where you are. It guides what we recommend. And it gives us a baseline to measure your progress against.

We don't guess. We test. Then we treat.

That's the difference between a clinic and a concierge medical practice.

Schedule your comprehensive lab panel at Rani. Link in bio.
mediaDescription: Behind-the-scenes of lab process: elegant flat lay of lab requisition forms and vials, followed by a graphic showing the different panels and what they reveal. Clean medical-meets-luxury aesthetic. Informative carousel format with Rani branding.
